decision_summary.rationale: The NAT Gateway is idle and not used by any active routes, making it safe to destroy without risk of data loss.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The NAT Gateway nat-gw-staging-app has been idle for 14 days, processing only 7 KB/day on average. There are no active routes using this gateway, confirming it is not required for any network traffic. NAT Gateways are stateless, so destroying it poses no data loss risk. The associated EIP eipalloc-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9 should also be released to avoid unnecessary costs.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers most key facts with specific metrics and resource identifiers, but the rationale lacks mention of the EIP idle cost ($3.60/month) and the lifecycle prevent_destroy requirement, and waste_evidence omits the fixed $0.045/hr charge breakdown.
